info.name: Direxio Message Server API
info.description: Generated from the local repository. Includes the current P2P product action surface and Matrix/Direxio Message Server route-index requests. Ordinary messages use Matrix Client-Server APIs; P2P message/search/backup actions have been removed. Current project documentation is docs/current-project-documentation.md.

item.name: P2P Event Stream（P2P事件流）
item.description:
P2P 投影事件和 agents room 网关事件的 SSE 流接口。普通消息使用 Matrix Client-Server sync/history/search API；配置的 agents room 中的普通消息可以额外发出 `agent_room.message` 网关事件。

SSE endpoint for projected Direxio product events and the agents room gateway event. Ordinary messages use Matrix Client-Server sync/history/search APIs except messages in the configured agents room, which can emit agent_room.message for local gateways.

request.description:
从持久 outbox 流式读取 P2P 投影事件。可通过 `Last-Event-ID` 或 `since` 查询参数在重连后回放漏掉的事件。

Stream projected P2P events from the durable outbox.

Endpoint: `GET /_p2p/events?since=<seq>`
Auth: Protected endpoint; use access_token.

The stream may include `agent_room.message` for ordinary messages in the configured agents room. Gateway-marked replies from `mcp.messages.send` are not re-emitted.

Use `Last-Event-ID` or the `since` query parameter to replay missed events after reconnecting.

item.name: P2P Body Action API（P2P动作接口）
item.description:
Direxio P2P body-action 接口集合。请求统一使用 `{ "action": "...", "params": { ... } }` 包装；除公开 action 外，默认使用 `access_token`；只有 MCP 类 action 可使用 `agent_token`。

Complete action collection generated from the P2P action registry. Public actions: channels.public.get, channels.public.join_request, channels.public.join_result, channels.public.search, contacts.reactivate, portal.auth, portal.bootstrap, portal.status, users.public_channels.

item.name: agent（智能体配置）

request.description:
读取 Agent 配置。

Read Agent config

Action: `agent.config.get`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/query`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

更新 Agent 配置。

Update Agent config

Action: `agent.config.update`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/command`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

Agent 读取当前门户密码。

Agent reads current portal password

Action: `agent.password`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/query`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

为 Direxio CLI 工具创建内部 Matrix 会话。

Create internal Matrix session for Direxio CLI tooling.

Action: `agent.matrix_session.create`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/command`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token. The returned Matrix access token is sensitive.

读取 Agent 状态。

Read Agent status

Action: `agent.status`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/query`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

item.description: 智能体配置、状态、密码和内部 Matrix 会话相关接口。

item.description: 管理 Agent token 可调用 action 权限的接口。

item.name: calls（通话）

request.description:
列出当前活跃通话。

List active calls

Action: `calls.active`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/query`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

创建通话会话。

Create call session

Action: `calls.create`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/command`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

更新通话会话状态。event 支持 connected、ended、rejected、missed、failed；写入后会通过 /_p2p/events 推送 call.changed。

Update call session state. Events support connected, ended, rejected, missed, and failed; writes emit call.changed through /_p2p/events.

Action: `calls.event`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/command`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

读取通话会话详情。

Read call session detail

Action: `calls.get`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/query`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

登记收到的来电会话。

Register incoming call session

Action: `calls.incoming`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/command`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

列出通话会话。

List call sessions

Action: `calls.list`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/query`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

item.description: 通话会话创建、查询、列表、活跃状态和状态事件接口。

item.name: channels（频道）

request.description:
创建频道。

Create channel

Action: `channels.create`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/command`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

解散当前用户拥有的频道。

Dissolve owned channel

Action: `channels.dissolve`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/command`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

邀请频道成员。

Invite channel members

Action: `channels.invite`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/command`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

创建面向某个分享房间的频道邀请授权。

Create a room-scoped channel invite grant

Action: `channels.invite_grant.create`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/command`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

The share room's current joined members are invited to the channel. Clients should call `channels.join` with `grant_id` or `share_room_id` when the invite card is opened.

通过房间 ID 加入频道。

Join channel by room id

Action: `channels.join`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/command`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

Response includes `operation` and the hydrated ProductCore `conversation` for direct client routing.

批准频道加入申请。

Approve channel join request

Action: `channels.join_request.approve`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/command`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

拒绝频道加入申请。

Reject channel join request

Action: `channels.join_request.reject`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/command`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

离开频道。

Leave channel

Action: `channels.leave`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/command`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

列出频道。

List channels

Action: `channels.list`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/query`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

禁言频道成员。

Mute channel member

Action: `channels.member.mute`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/command`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

移除频道成员。

Remove channel member

Action: `channels.member.remove`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/command`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

解除频道成员禁言。

Unmute channel member

Action: `channels.member.unmute`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/command`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

列出频道成员。

List channel members

Action: `channels.members`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/query`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

静音频道。

Mute channel

Action: `channels.mute`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/command`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

列出当前 owner 的频道评论。

List owner channel comments

Action: `channels.my_comments`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/query`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

更新频道读标记。

Update channel read marker

Action: `channels.read_marker`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/command`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

取消频道静音。

Unmute channel

Action: `channels.unmute`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/command`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

更新频道资料。

Update channel

Action: `channels.update`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/command`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

item.description: 频道创建、邀请、加入、成员管理、静音、读标记和资料更新接口。

item.name: contacts（联系人）

request.description:
删除联系人。

Delete contact

Action: `contacts.delete`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/command`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

列出联系人。

List contacts

Action: `contacts.list`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/query`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

创建联系人申请。

Create contact request

Action: `contacts.request`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/command`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

向保留的联系人重新发起已有直聊房间邀请。

Reinvite a retained peer to an existing direct room

Action: `contacts.reactivate`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/query`
Auth: Public peer-node action. The target node only invites when it still has an accepted contact for the same requester and room_id. If the target node deleted or no longer retains the relationship, callers must keep the old room as a pending contact request and wait for target-side acceptance.

更新联系人备注。

Update contact remark

Action: `contacts.update`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/command`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

item.description: 联系人列表、申请、删除、重新邀请和备注更新接口。

item.name: conversations（会话）

request.description:
读取一个 ProductCore 会话详情，返回稳定会话身份、成员数、成员关系、角色、水合状态、原因和能力信息。

Read one ProductCore conversation. The response includes stable conversation identity plus member_count, membership, relationship_status, role, hydration_state, hydration_reason, and capabilities (`open`, `send`, `invite`, `manage_members`, `rename`, `remove_members`, `leave`, `delete`).

Action: `conversations.get`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/query`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

列出 ProductCore 会话，返回稳定会话身份、成员数、成员关系、角色、水合状态、原因和能力信息。

List ProductCore conversations. Each conversation includes stable conversation identity plus member_count, membership, relationship_status, role, hydration_state, hydration_reason, and capabilities (`open`, `send`, `invite`, `manage_members`, `rename`, `remove_members`, `leave`, `delete`).

Action: `conversations.list`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/query`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

item.description: ProductCore 会话列表和详情接口，返回会话身份、成员、关系、能力和水合状态。

item.name: MCP（智能体接口）
item.description: Direxio Local MCP 相关接口，面向本地 Agent/工具调用。可使用 `agent_token` 或 owner `access_token` 鉴权。

request.description:
搜索 Direxio Local MCP 使用的联系人、群组和频道摘要。

Search concise contact, group, and channel room summaries for Direxio Local MCP.

Action: `mcp.rooms.search`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/query`
Auth: 使用 agent_token（`{{agentToken}}`）或 access_token。

通过 MCP action 发送普通 Matrix 房间文本消息。

Send a plain ordinary Matrix room message through the protected MCP action.

Action: `mcp.messages.send`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/command`
Auth: 使用 agent_token（`{{agentToken}}`）或 access_token。

查询指定房间的普通消息摘要；不包含频道帖子和评论。

List concise ordinary message summaries for a room. Channel posts and comments are excluded.

Action: `mcp.messages.list`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/query`
Auth: 使用 agent_token（`{{agentToken}}`）或 access_token。

查询频道房间内的帖子摘要。

List concise channel post summaries for a channel room.

Action: `mcp.channel_posts.list`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/query`
Auth: 使用 agent_token（`{{agentToken}}`）或 access_token。

查询指定频道帖子的评论摘要。

List concise comment summaries for a channel post.

Action: `mcp.channel_comments.list`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/query`
Auth: 使用 agent_token（`{{agentToken}}`）或 access_token。

通过 MCP action 给已有频道帖子创建纯文本评论。

Create a plain text comment on an existing channel post through the MCP action.

Action: `mcp.channel_comments.create`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/command`
Auth: 使用 agent_token（`{{agentToken}}`）或 access_token。

item.name: portal（门户认证）

request.description:
验证门户密码并返回 `access_token` 和 `initialized`。

Authenticate the portal password and return `access_token` plus `initialized`. `initialized` is true only after the generated initial password has been changed.

Action: `portal.auth`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/query`
Auth: Public action; no bearer token required.

验证初始门户密码并返回 `access_token` 和 `initialized`。

Validate the current portal password and return `access_token` plus `initialized`. `initialized` remains false until `portal.password` changes the generated initial password.

Action: `portal.bootstrap`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/query`
Auth: Public action; no bearer token required.

修改门户密码、轮换 `access_token`，并将 `initialized` 置为 true。

Change the portal password, rotate `access_token`, and set `initialized` to true.

Action: `portal.password`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/command`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

读取门户初始化状态。

Read portal initialization status

Action: `portal.status`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/query`
Auth: Public action; no bearer token required.

item.description: 门户初始化、登录、密码轮换和初始化状态查询接口。

item.name: sync（首屏同步）

request.description:
读取首屏元数据，响应包含当前真实 agents Matrix 房间 `agent_room_id`，客户端可用它在重启后恢复 Agent 会话。

Read first-screen metadata. The response includes the current real agents Matrix room `agent_room_id`, which clients can cache to restore the Agent conversation after restart.

Action: `sync.bootstrap`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/query`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

更新读标记。

Update read marker

Action: `sync.read_marker`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/command`
Auth: Protected action; use access_token.

item.name: users（用户公开信息）

request.description:
列出某个用户拥有的公开频道。跨节点查询时可在 params 中传 `remote_node_base_url`，本地节点会转发到目标 owner 节点。

List public channels owned by a user. For cross-node lookup, optionally pass `remote_node_base_url` in params so the local node forwards to the target owner node.

Action: `users.public_channels`
Endpoint: `POST /_p2p/query`
Auth: Public action; no bearer token required.

item.description: 用户公开频道等公开资料查询接口。
